title: Delivery: fanout public posts to relay inboxes
description: When delivering a public post (to: as:Public), add all active relay inbox URLs to the delivery target list alongside follower inboxes. This is the outbound half — ensures our posts reach the relay for redistribution. Approximately 20 lines in the delivery fanout logic.
close_reason: Implemented: fan_out queries active relays table and adds their inbox_uri to delivery targets alongside follower inboxes. Deduplication via seen HashSet.
